words.hint: Cat - a pet that says meow
Dog - a pet that says woof
Fish - it swims in water
Bird - it can fly and sing
Frog - green and goes hop hop
Cow - farm animal that gives milk
Lion - king of the jungle
Rabbit - it hops and has long ears
Ball - you kick it or throw it
Tree - tall and green with leaves
Fruit - sweet and good to eat
Flower - pretty and smells nice
Sun - it shines in the sky by day
Moon - it glows in the sky at night
Star - it twinkles at night
House - a place where we live
Car - it has wheels and drives
Milk - a white drink that is good for you
Egg - a hen lays it
Banana - a long yellow fruit
Mango - a sweet yellow fruit
Mouse - a small animal
Goat - a farm animal
Water - we drink it
Eye - we see with it
